Here is the behavior.

julia_bug $ julia
               _
   _       _ _(_)_     |  Documentation: https://docs.julialang.org
  (_)     | (_) (_)    |
   _ _   _| |_  __ _   |  Type "?" for help, "]?" for Pkg help.
  | | | | | | |/ _` |  |
  | | |_| | | | (_| |  |  Version 1.11.1 (2024-10-16)
 _/ |\__'_|_|_|\__'_|  |  Official https://julialang.org/ release
|__/                   |

(@v1.11) pkg> up
  Installing known registries into `~/.julia`
Segmentation fault (core dumped)


I tried to generate a report, but even this fails:

julia_bug $ julia --bug-report=rr
[ Info: Loading BugReporting package...
[ Info: Package `BugReporting` not found - attempting temporary installation
  Installing known registries into `~/.julia`
Segmentation fault (core dumped)


However, non-Pkg related functionality works:

julia_bug $ julia
               _
   _       _ _(_)_     |  Documentation: https://docs.julialang.org
  (_)     | (_) (_)    |
   _ _   _| |_  __ _   |  Type "?" for help, "]?" for Pkg help.
  | | | | | | |/ _` |  |
  | | |_| | | | (_| |  |  Version 1.11.1 (2024-10-16)
 _/ |\__'_|_|_|\__'_|  |  Official https://julialang.org/ release
|__/                   |

julia> println("Hello World ",2^10)
Hello World 1024
